FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Tok

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

The active design-token table + the theme switch. Author UI reads tokens via the static getters (e.g. Tok.FillCardDefault); they resolve against T at zero per-read cost. Use(ThemeKind) re-themes the whole app with one pointer write. The OS accent + Mica window background are mutable overrides on top of the set, so they survive a theme swap and let the host inject the live system accent at startup.

public static class Tok

object

Field Value

TokenSet

Properties

AccentControlElevationBorder

WinUI AccentControlElevationBorderBrush (accent buttons / checked toggles): the same absolute 3px band, mirrored (ScaleY=-1) in BOTH themes — the darker on-accent secondary edge sits at the BOTTOM (Common_themeresources_any.xaml:198-205 dark / :397-404 light).

public static GradientSpec AccentControlElevationBorder { get; }

Property Value

GradientSpec

AcrylicFlyout

Property Value

ColorF

CircleElevationBorder

WinUI CircleElevationBorderBrush (Common_themeresources_any.xaml:192-198 dark / :391-397 light): a RelativeToBoundingBox vertical 2-stop gradient — ControlStrokeColorDefault @0.50 → ControlStrokeColorSecondary @0.70 — the subtle rim on circular knobs/glyphs (ToggleSwitch SwitchKnobOn stroke, RadioButton glyph stroke).

public static GradientSpec CircleElevationBorder { get; }

Property Value

GradientSpec

ControlElevationBorder

WinUI ControlElevationBorderBrush: the signature Fluent control border — MappingMode="Absolute" StartPoint 0,0 EndPoint 0,3: the secondary→default blend lives in a 3-PHYSICAL-px band at one edge, the default stroke everywhere else (Common_themeresources_any.xaml:186-191 dark). LIGHT carries a ScaleTransform ScaleY=-1 (:382-390) anchoring the band (darker secondary edge) at the BOTTOM — encoded as AnchorEnd. Theme-aware; pass to BoxEl.BorderBrush. (Allocated at reconcile time, not per frame.)

public static GradientSpec ControlElevationBorder { get; }

Property Value

GradientSpec

WindowBackground 

public static ColorF WindowBackground { get; }

Property Value

ColorF

Methods

SetAccent(ColorF?)

Inject the OS accent (host startup) or a developer global override; all accent tokens (fill + text + subtle + hero + attention) recompute from it. Pass null to clear the override and revert to the theme default.

public static void SetAccent(ColorF? c)

Parameters

c ColorF?

SetWindowBackground(ColorF) 

public static void SetWindowBackground(ColorF c)

Parameters

c ColorF

Use(ThemeKind) 

public static void Use(ThemeKind kind)

Parameters

kind ThemeKind
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
